description_long: This is a Yamaha DX7 digital synthesizer keyboard, featuring a full-sized, rectangular body with a matte black finish. The front panel is adorned with a series of turquoise and gray buttons, sliders, and a digital display, all arranged above a standard piano-style keybed with both black and white keys. The left side of the keyboard includes pitch and modulation wheels, while the right side displays the DX7 branding and additional control labels. The rear panel is equipped with various input/output ports for audio and MIDI connectivity. The overall design is sleek and professional, with a combination of plastic and metal materials. This keyboard is typically used for music production and live performances, often found in studios, rehearsal spaces, or urban entertainment venues.
description: A Yamaha DX7 digital synthesizer keyboard with a black body, turquoise controls, and a full set of piano keys. It features a professional, sleek design with multiple control buttons and connectivity ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keybed, control panel with turquoise buttons, and the DX7 branding.
description_view_1: Angled left view highlighting the pitch and modulation wheels and the depth of the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the input/output ports and the overall rectangular shape of the keyboard.
description_view_3: Angled right view emphasizing the DX7 logo, control labels, and the arrangement of the keys.
